titleStmt.title: SII 26.329: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 329. (A.R. No. 311 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the same Prākarā.

p.hi: Tribhº Vijayagaṇḍagōpāladēva: Year 28, Mithuna (Āṉi) ba. 5, Wednesday = 1279 A.D., May 31.

summary.p: This inscription is built in at the beginning, so a few letters at the beginning of each line are not available.

It records the sale of the village comprising the blocks of Oḍḍaṅgāḍu, Śōṟaṉtiruttu and Āchāriyaṉtiruttu and forming a hamlet of Peruṁbēḍu in Māgaṇūr-nāḍu in Śeṅgāṭṭuk-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam, by the ūr of the same place, to two persons, one named Kuḷattuḻāṉ Mārippiḷḷai alias Śīṉattaraiyar of Dharmapuram in Śurattūr-nāḍu in the kōṭṭam (name lost), and the other named Aṟamaḷattār (Aṟamvaḷattār ?) of the same place. The details of the boundaries are given. At the end a list of signatories representing the ūr of Perumbēḍu, is also given.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Beginning of each line is lost.ṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvicaiyakaṇṭakopālatevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 8 vatu mituṉanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu pañcamiyum puta
jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattuc ceṅkāṭṭukkoṭṭattu mākaṇūr nāṭṭup perumpeṭṭu Ūravarom
ttu curattūr nāṭṭut tarmapurattu kuḷattuḻāṉ mārippiḷḷaiyāṉa ciṉattarayarkku meṟpaṭi Aṟamaḷattārkkum nāṅka
ḷukku viṟṟukkuṭutta Eṅkaḷūr piṭākai Oṭṭaṅkāṭu coṟaṉtiruttu Ācāriyaṉ tiruttu Uṭpaṭa nilaṅkaḷukku Ellai
cāvatu nāṅkaḷ Ivarkaḷukku viṟṟukkuṭutta Ivvūrkku Ellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai puḷiyantāṅkal karai
llai Uṟṟa vāmpukkum Ittāṅkal karaikku nāvicaṉkuḻik kiḻkaraikkum Itukku teṟku kaṭappaṅ kuḻikki pu
nokkippoṉa peruvarampukkum Āka Ivvellaikaḷukku meṟkum teṉpāṟ Ellai Akaratteri Itaṟkuṟa
meṟkum vaṇṇāṉ kuḻi teṉkaraikkum Itukku meṟku caṭaitāṅkal nirkoḷukkum Itukku meṟkku §
lanir koḷukkum Itaṉmeṟku Ēri Etirvāykkum Āka Iv Ellaikaḷukku vaṭakkum melpāṟ Ellai muruka
ḷapākkattāṉ kuḻikkum Ivvellaikaḷukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ Ellai Ikkuḻikku kiḻakku nokkipoykaṭappa
ḻakku vaṭakku nokkippoy nir kuṉṟaṅkāraṇaikku nirpāykiṟa peruṅkālil Uṟṟa Ellai tuṭaṅki Ippe
teṟkum Āka Ippaṭikoṇṭu Ivvūrkku nāṟpāṟ Ellaikkum Ellaic cātaṉam paṇṇikkuṭuttom perumpaṭṭu Ūrava
pākkiḻāṉ Ānan=tapotaṉ ciṅkaḷarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vaḷaikiḻāṉ viḻicuramuṭaiyāṉ pañcanetivāṇaṉ
ṇaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ puṟṟiṭaṅkoṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kuṟuṅkuṭi Amāṇṭai Eḻuttu
kkiḻāṉ t(o)vāṇṭai periyanāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Uṭaikkāṭaṉ tevāṇṭaiyeṉ Ippaṭi Ivai
tevaṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Uṭaikkāṭaṉ teṉṉavarāyaṉ poṉṉāṇṭaiyeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ
ṉ Ippaṭikku Ivai vaḷaikiḻāṉ pañcanetivāṇaṉ viḻicuramuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 26.329 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
